results.title: ‘That’s the bare minimum now’: Derry City coach Mitchell calls one team to build on recent results
results.description: Candystripes made winning return to Brandywell on Friday night

results.title: Leclerc pins hopes on Hamilton synergy to derail Mercedes in Austria
results.description: Charles Leclerc is banking on teamwork with Lewis Hamilton to help Ferrari challenge Mercedes at the Austrian Grand Prix. The Monegasque, who finally put an end to his recent qualifying struggles over the last two weekends, had briefly set the fastest time of the session after Max Verstappen’s crash brought out the yellow flags.

results.title: The NHL Draft passes without a major Penguins trade. Where does Kyle Dubas go from here?
results.description: It’s been one of the wildest NHL offseasons in recent memory, and free agency hasn’t even opened.

results.title: Quaker Valley star and Maryland commit Mimi Thiero is named the Post-Gazette Athlete of the Year for girls
results.description: For Mimi Thiero, a love of basketball was bred just a bit out of jealousy.

results.title: Caitlin Clark hard contact timeline: WNBA's growing history of brutal hits against the face of the sport
results.description: From Chennedy Carter's hip-check to Alyssa Thomas's closed fist to the throat, a timeline of the most controversial hits on Caitlin Clark's WNBA career.
